name: Oatmeal-Banana Lebkuchen
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Mixed candied fruit, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, cream together the margarine, brown sugar, honey, cinnamon, ginger, cardamom, and cloves until well combined.
3. Add the bananas, eggs, flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Mix until just combined.
4. Stir in the chopped almonds and candied fruit.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 9x13 inch baking pan.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack before serving.
